data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Mining Meningioma Proteomics Alterations Using IP MS
project.projectDescription: Herein we have used IP-MS based approach to identify potential interactors (PPI) that bind to Annexin A2. We have used Immunoaffinity based enrichment using antibody specific to ANXA2 followed by LC MS-MS of the Complex post running it in SDS-PAGE
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Brain tumor tissue lysates were precleared using Protein G beads(CST) post the conjugation of the Antibody with the beads, the conjugated complex was used as a 'bait' to capture potential interacting partners that would bind to ANXA2.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data was analysed using Proteome Discoverer 2.2, all three replicates were run using the same gradient of 60 minutes in the LC MS-MS.

labPIs.title: Dr

labPIs.name: SANJEEVA SRIVASTAVA

references.referenceLine: Mukherjee S, Biswas D, Gadre R, Jain P, Syed N, Stylianou J, Zeng Q, Mahadevan A, Epari S, Shetty P, Moiyadi A, Roy Ball G, Srivastava S. Comprehending Meningioma Signaling Cascades Using Multipronged Proteomics Approaches & Targeted Validation of Potential Markers. Front Oncol. 2020 10:1600

Characteristics[Specimen]: Surgically resected tissues were procured from patients diagnosed to be meningiomas by radiology.
Characteristics[MaterialType]: Tumor tissues were flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen (Supplementary Table 1).
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: Trypsin (Pierce, Thermo Fisher Scientific, United States)
Characteristics[NumberOfSamples]: peptide samples of 21 patients and 8 non-tumor controls
MG1 (n = 10), MG II (n = 11), MGIII (n = 2), Normal dura mater (n = 4), and Arachnoid mater (n = 4)
Comment[Instrument]: Q-Exactive Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, United States)
Comment[GradientTime]: using a gradient of 0.1% FA and Acetonitrile for 240 with blanks after every sample.
